daily.today_energy: The cosmic vibes are giving introspective queen energy. Mercury's got your back today, making it easier to articulate those feelings you've been sitting with. Trust the quiet moments—they're where your magic lives.
daily.love: Someone's picking up what you're putting down, even if you haven't said it out loud yet. Whether you're coupled or solo, vulnerability is your superpower rn. Let people see the real you without the filter.
daily.career: Your creative instincts are *chef's kiss* today. This is your moment to pitch that idea you've been workshopping in your head. Your intuition knows what's next—trust it more than the spreadsheet.
daily.health: Your nervous system's asking for some TLC. Consider movement that feels good rather than punishing—dance, walk, stretch, whatever makes you feel alive. Hydration and rest aren't boring; they're revolutionary.

weekly.overview: Mercury's moving through your sector of intuition this week, Pisces. Trust those gut feelings hitting different—they're basically your cosmic group chat telling you what's up. Vibe shifts incoming.
weekly.love: Your emotional frequency is magnetic rn. Whether you're coupled up or solo, lean into authenticity over performance. Real connections thrive when you stop trying to be the 'chill' version of yourself.
weekly.career: Ideas are flowing but pace matters. You don't need to pitch everything immediately. Let your creative energy marinate a bit—your colleagues will notice the shift in your presence this week.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentler rhythms. Skip the productivity grind and honor what actually refuels you—whether that's water, rest, or just existing without a to-do list. Self-care isn't lazy.
